examples: We told the scoutmaster what had happened in the evening.
My scoutmaster had an influence on the way I view the world.
Several days later, the scoutmaster had to be away for a day.
Mr Hattersley said it was "disturbing" that the scoutmaster, who has since died, had been blamed.
Oz treats the operating room like a Cub Scout den, and he is its jovial but determined scoutmaster.
